What is Ethnography?
opts: A social scientist spends a considerable time observing and analysing how people actually work.

What is Scenarios?
opts: Interaction is with system stakeholders from managers to external regulators.
are real-life examples of how a system can be used.

What is Scope of Ethnography?
opts: The problem with ethnography is that it studies existing practices which may have some historical basis which is no longer relevant.
Requirements that are derived from the way that people actually work rather than the way I which process definitions suggest that they ought to work.
Social and organisational factors of importance may be observed
a: Requirements that are derived from the way that people actually work rather than the way I which process definitions suggest that they ought to work.

q: Precision is difficult without making the document difficult to read.
What is Software Requirements document?
opts: Applies to the system as a whole rather than individual features or services.
Defines what should be implemented so may be part of a contract between client and contractor.
Is the official statement of what is required of the system developers
a: Is the official statement of what is required of the system developers

q: What is Functional Requirements?
opts: Defines what should be implemented so may be part of a contract between client and contractor.
Often apply to the system as a whole rather than individual features or services.

A statement using some measure that can be objectively tested.
